arts.ttl: Sydney Supporters Clubs take Palace-Brighton rivalry down under
arts.sum: Ahead of Saturday's match-up between Crystal Palace and Brighton & Hove Albion at Selhurst Park, we spoke to Lewis Dew who – along with Crystal Palace’s Sydney Supporters’ Club – recently took our traditional rivalry down under, and all for a fantastic cause...

arts.ttl: How to watch & follow Palace vs Brighton LIVE
arts.sum: Crystal Palace face rivals Brighton & Hove Albion at Selhurst Park on Saturday, 5th April (15:00 BST) – and here's how you can watch and follow the action LIVE!

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace lineup vs. Brighton: Predicted XI for M23 derby in the Premier League
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at how Crystal Palace could line up in the M23 derby against Brighton & Hove Albion at Selhurst Park in the Premier League on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Brighton lineup vs. Crystal Palace: Predicted XI for M23 derby in the Premier League
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at how Brighton & Hove Albion could line up in the M23 derby away to Crystal Palace at Selhurst Park in the Premier League on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Brighton man admits he has decision to make in summer – Injury is still bothering him
arts.sum: Brighton and Hove Albion midfielder Julio Enciso has admitted that the knee injury he suffered recently is continuing to cause him problems and may lead to a big decision in the summer. Versus have a brief interview with the midfielder today as he continues to impress at Ipswich Town, who he joined on loan in The post Brighton man admits he has decision to make in summer – Injury is still bothering him appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: The Palace v Brighton rivalry explained
arts.sum: Given the near 50-mile gap between the two clubs, Crystal Palace v Brighton & Hove Albion is unlike a traditional rivalry between clubs in close proximity to one another - but one set to be resumed at Selhurst Park this Saturday (5th April 2025).

arts.ttl: Preview: Crystal Palace vs. Brighton & Hove Albion - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Premier League clash between Crystal Palace and Brighton & Hove Albion, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: ‘A little weird’ - Sunderland boss reacts to Tommy Watson’s £10m Brighton and Hove Albion move
arts.sum: Sunderland boss Regis Le Bris has been left surprised by the timing of Tommy Watson’s move to Brighton and Hove Albion.

arts.ttl: Brighton need a lot more to secure transfer – Crystal Palace, Fulham and Sheffield United remain in the lead
arts.sum: Brighton and Hove Albion will need to significantly up their bid for Terry Yegbe, with Crystal Palace, Fulham and Sheffield United still in the lead for him. That’s according to Fotboll Direkt, who dispel reports emerging from Ghana regarding the defender and insist Brighton are not close to winning the race for him.
